summary: Iteration 182: All 4 P0 Bug Fixes Verified. Backend tests: 13/13 passed (100%). Frontend: All pages load correctly. Bug 1 (Onboarding 422) - FIXED: start_date accepts null. Bug 2 (Streak sync) - FIXED: Returns best_streak=46, current_streak=1. Bug 3 (Referral tree) - FIXED: Properly nested tree structure. Bug 4 (Member count) - FIXED: Uses total from API response.

issues: Missing API Keys modal appears on every page - may need configuration but not blocking functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Bug 1 (Onboarding) VERIFIED: OnboardingData model lines 68-76 in profit_routes.py correctly accepts Optional start_date=None
Bug 2 (Streak sync) VERIFIED: rewards.py lines 125-126 now correctly read current_streak_days and best_streak_days fields
Bug 3 (Referral tree) VERIFIED: admin/tree endpoint lines 230-295 correctly maps both referral_code and merin_referral_code
Bug 4 (Member count) VERIFIED: AdminDashboardPage.jsx line 66 uses membersRes.data.total instead of array.length
API response structure verified: /api/admin/members returns {total, members[], page_size}
Rewards summary API correctly returns: current_streak=1, best_streak=46 for admin user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 182 verified all 4 P0 bug fixes: (1) Onboarding endpoint accepts null start_date without 422 error, (2) Rewards summary returns non-zero streak values (best=46, current=1), (3) Referral tree correctly nests users using both referral_code and merin_referral_code mappings, (4) Frontend AdminDashboardPage uses total from API response. All fixes working correctly.

bug_1_onboarding_422_error.issue: POST /api/profit/complete-onboarding returned 422 when start_date was null for new trader
bug_1_onboarding_422_error.fix: OnboardingData model accepts Optional[str] = None for start_date (line 71)
bug_1_onboarding_422_error.evidence: API accepts {user_type:'new', starting_balance:250, start_date:null, transactions:[], trade_entries:[], total_commission:0}

bug_2_streak_not_syncing.issue: Streak showed 67 in hub but 0 on Rewards page due to wrong field name
bug_2_streak_not_syncing.fix: rewards.py lines 125-126 now use current_streak_days and best_streak_days

bug_3_referral_tree_empty.issue: 38 referred but only 1 node showing in referral tree
bug_3_referral_tree_empty.fix: admin/tree endpoint now maps both referral_code and merin_referral_code
bug_3_referral_tree_empty.evidence: Tree structure correctly nests referred users under their inviters

bug_4_member_count_mismatch.issue: Admin Dashboard showed 20 vs Members list showed 50 (was using array.length capped at page limit)
bug_4_member_count_mismatch.fix: AdminDashboardPage.jsx line 66 uses membersRes.data.total instead of array.length
bug_4_member_count_mismatch.evidence: API returns {total: 6, members: [6 items]} - frontend shows 6
